top_signals.title: Ukrainian nuclear plant reaching ’point of no return,’ Russian nuclear head says
top_signals.summary: The Russia-installed management at the Russian-held Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant in Ukraine said Ukrainian forces had attacked the facility for the third day running.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
